content.summaryText: Macronutrients 101 in Balanced Nutrition Principles focuses on balanced macro/micronutrient planning. Primary objective: Identify macro roles.

content.questionText: In Macronutrients 101, which action best supports 'Identify macro roles'?
content.explanation: Correct answers prioritize patient safety, reassessment, and timely escalation.

options.text: Assess dietary intake and set one realistic nutritional goal
Giving generic advice that ignores patient context and affordability
Delay reassessment until symptoms are severe
Use treatment decisions without baseline documentation

content.summaryText: Immediate priority: assess dietary intake and set one realistic nutritional goal. Practical emphasis: Balance plate composition.

content.questionText: Escalation is required when rapid weight loss, malnutrition signs, or high-risk metabolic markers.
content.explanation: Early escalation reduces preventable deterioration and delays in definitive care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
